# Delivery Lead Checklist (Template)

Daily / Iteration responsibilities for the Delivery Lead to keep delivery on track.

Daily
- [ ] Run/attend daily sync and capture blockers
- [ ] Confirm owner and ETA for each blocker; escalate when appropriate
- [ ] Validate cross-team dependencies and notify impacted teams
- [ ] Ensure PRs ready for review are assigned and tracked

Weekly
- [ ] Review milestone progress and update Project Manager / PdM
- [ ] Confirm upcoming release readiness and outstanding items
- [ ] Coordinate with Release Manager on deployment windows
- [ ] Validate test coverage for critical flows with QA

Handoff & escalation
- [ ] When blocked beyond team control → escalate to Project Manager
- [ ] If a release risk is identified → involve Release Manager and SRE
- [ ] Track follow-up action items in backlog and ensure owners are assigned

Notes:
- Store links to relevant project board filters and release PRs in the checklist item context for quick access.
